variants: Tamari Chavchavadze is a prominent expert in the field of Remote Sensing. She is well-known for her innovative creation, Plumecrypt Data Ribbon, which has garnered significant attention in the scientific community. Her contributions to the field were recognized when she received the Nebula Ember Trophy for her exemplary work. Furthermore, Tamari is an active member of the Hardpan Fossil Hunters, where she enjoys combining her passion for paleontology with her technical skills. Inspiring her journey in this discipline was her mentor and doctoral advisor, Saidah Zitouni.
